channel.title: Flickr on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Flickr on Nature Works

item.title: Where to store your garden blog photos
item.description:
One for you gdnbloggers – after a recent fracas with Flickr, a quick of summary of where online you can catalogue, store & link to your garden photos

Back in the day, I used WordPress to write my blog and moreover used it to upload all my worthy garden photos. http://localhost:1313/blog/store-garden-blog-photos/
